headline: Costco and Walmart Deserve Their Rich Valuations, This Analyst Says
summary: John San Marco, senior research analyst at Neuberger Berman, also likes Home Depot and Ulta Beauty. Which discounter has been unfairly snubbed by investors?

headline: Home Depot CFO Warns Demand Softening, Housing “Frozen” as Big-Ticket Projects Stall at JPM Forum
summary: Home Depot (NYSE:HD) Chief Financial Officer Richard McPhail said the home improvement demand backdrop softened through 2025 as consumer confidence drifted lower amid uncertainty, inflation concerns, geopolitical events, and fears of job loss. Speaking at JPMorgan’s 12th Annual Retail Round Up Forum

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Home Depot (HD) After Recent Share Price Strength?
summary: Investors may be wondering if Home Depot, at around US$336 per share, still offers solid value or if most of the upside has already been priced in. The stock has returned 2.0% over the past week. However, the 30 day and year to date returns of 4.9% and 2.8% declines, along with a 3.0% decline over the last year, suggest sentiment has been mixed despite a 24.8% three year and 18.7% five year return. Recent coverage has focused on Home Depot's position as a major U.S. home improvement retailer...

headline: RH and Home Depot Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after President Trump announced a two-week suspension of attacks on Iran, resulting in a 17% drop in crude oil prices.

headline: Goldman Sachs, Caterpillar Lead DIA ETF Gains In Dow's Strongest Session In A Year
summary: The Dow Jones delivered its strongest daily performance in a year on April 8, surging more than 1,300 points.
